title: 01.16.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 16, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for January 9, 2026 through January 15, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of January 9–15, 2026. It includes logs of public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached records show a high volume of police department records requests, including background checks, police reports, traffic accidents, and body-worn camera footage.
fields.key_stats: The public records request log (partial, pages 1–3 of 12) shows over 75 requests logged for the week of January 9–15, 2026, with the majority being Police Department Records requests. Categories include background checks, police reports, traffic accidents, body-worn camera video, 911/dispatch records, building plans/permits, and code enforcement violations.
fields.action_items: City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to process and respond to all requests received during the January 9–15, 2026 reporting period per standard procedures.

projects: Weekly Code Enforcement Service Requests Report
